summary: Commercial Engine v2.0 NEW features testing complete. All 20 backend API tests passed. Frontend verified: Services section (3 categories: Websites, Apps, KI Add-ons with 7 items), Trust section (6 compliance cards + EU emblem), Pricing (2 tariffs: Starter 499, Growth 1.299), FAQ (10 items visible), Admin Commercial tab (quotes table, stats cards). Datenschutz page has updated sections 2.4-2.6 and Revolut in Auftragsverarbeiter.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Engine v2.0 fully tested including NEW features: Services API (7 services, 3 bundles), Compliance API (8 items + ISO gap analysis), Security Headers (6 headers), Extended FAQ (17+ entries). Frontend verified: Services section (3 categories), Trust section (6 cards + EU emblem), Pricing (2 tariffs), Admin Commercial tab, Datenschutz updated sections. All pricing verified. Cookie banner must be dismissed first when testing frontend.

mocked_apis_list: Revolut Merchant API — keys are test placeholders, orders will fail gracefully with bank_transfer fallback
mocked_apis.note: Revolut API returns fallback response as expected with test keys
